menu_items.Name: Midnight Brew
menu_items.Description: A bold, dark roast with notes of chocolate and smoke.

menu_items.Name: Stardust Latte
menu_items.Description: Espresso, oat milk, and a dusting of edible glitter and cardamom.

menu_items.Name: Eclipse Mocha
menu_items.Description: Rich dark cocoa, espresso, and a dash of cayenne pepper.

menu_items.Name: Moonlight Jasmine
menu_items.Description: Organic green tea pearls scented with fresh jasmine blossoms.

menu_items.Name: Velvet Chamomile
menu_items.Description: Soothing chamomile flowers with a hint of honey and lavender.

menu_items.Name: Neon Nights Toast
menu_items.Description: Sourdough with whipped feta, roasted grapes, and thyme.

menu_items.Name: Cosmic Granola Bowl
menu_items.Description: House-made oat cluster granola with Greek yogurt and berry compote.

menu_items.Name: Midnight Macarons
menu_items.Description: A box of three charcoal-infused dark chocolate macarons.

menu_items.Name: Luna's Moon Pie
menu_items.Description: A gourmet take on the classic: chocolate-dipped marshmallow and graham.
